description_long: This sculpture depicts a recumbent human figure draped in flowing robes, lying atop a rectangular stone plinth. The figure appears to be in repose, with one arm extended and the head resting gently to the side, partially covered by the drapery. The stone base features carved inscriptions, including the words 'LA LOI' and 'RADIN', and a sculpted wreath is visible at the foot of the plinth. The drapery is rendered with intricate folds, giving a sense of softness and realism to the stone. The entire piece rests on a stepped, lighter-colored base, suggesting a formal or commemorative function. The overall impression is solemn and monumental, evoking themes of memory or tribute.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a reclining, robed human figure atop an inscribed rectangular plinth, with realistic drapery and a sculpted wreath at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the recumbent figure, with draped robes cascading over the edge and the head and feet both visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the detailed folds of the drapery, and the rectangular plinth beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head, the wreath at the base, and the end of the plinth.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended arm, the inscriptions 'LA LOI' and 'RADIN', and the overall length of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: reclining human figure in draped robes on a commemorative plinth
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
